positioning: A fictional B2B component supplier demo site used to show how Content Engine Lite organizes site data, keyword tasks, and article generation inputs.
conversionGoal: encourage qualified buyers to request a sample kit or specification sheet
writingStyle: Use concrete operational details, plain English, and buyer-safe caveats. Avoid promising business outcomes.
mustSay: Generated content must be reviewed by a human before publishing.
Use measurable product and process details where available.
Clarify when a statement is general guidance rather than a verified claim.
